summary: The diff implements most of the required features for the Egyptian auto-chess game polish. REQ-8, REQ-9, REQ-10, and REQ-12 are well-addressed. REQ-11 is partially addressed: App.tsx and game components are properly updated, but stub/legacy files (GameScene.tsx, Terrain.tsx, PlantMesh.tsx, AnimalMesh.tsx, ControlPanel.tsx, StatsPanel.tsx, Header.tsx, Quiz.tsx, Footer.tsx) are listed as modified (not removed) and the frontend-file-summaries.txt still describes them as functioning ecosystem/quiz components, indicating they were not removed from the project.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure all empty stub components (ControlPanel.tsx, GameScene.tsx, StatsPanel.tsx, Terrain.tsx, PlantMesh.tsx, AnimalMesh.tsx) are either removed from the project or replaced with meaningful Egyptian auto-chess implementations. Remove any component files that belong to prior unrelated apps.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows Header.tsx, Footer.tsx, Quiz.tsx, GameScene.tsx, Terrain.tsx, PlantMesh.tsx, AnimalMesh.tsx, ControlPanel.tsx, and StatsPanel.tsx as modified files, not removed. The frontend-file-summaries.txt still describes these files with their original ecosystem/quiz purposes. No removals are listed in the diff. The acceptance criteria requiring no plant/animal mesh/ecosystem components in the codebase is not met.

hallucinated_features.description: GameOverScreen component with victory/defeat detection and Play Again / Main Menu navigation
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a GameOverScreen component explicitly in REQ-8 through REQ-12. The gameplay screen requirements list only HUD, battle board, shop, synergy panel, and bench.

hallucinated_features.description: BattleLog component added as a new standalone file rendered in the gameplay screen
hallucinated_features.reason: None of REQ-8 through REQ-12 explicitly request a BattleLog component. The gameplay screen layout in REQ-8 lists HUD, battle board, shop, synergy panel, and bench with no mention of a battle log.

hallucinated_features.description: UnitDetail component added as a new standalone file in the left panel of the gameplay screen
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-8 specifies the gameplay screen shows HUD, battle board, shop, synergy panel, and bench. UnitDetail is not listed as a required component in any of the requirements.
